meaning: n.形而上学,玄学,纯粹哲学,宇宙哲学
examples: Promote materialist dialectics and oppose metaphysics and scholasticism.
Suppose we accept all that metaphysics.
Additional terminology is always helpful for the learners of metaphysics.
The problem was that the new, Western astronomy was embedded in a very different metaphysics.
But Brooks supplies neither drama, high emotion, nor the mindbending metaphysics of aging without time.
